description: React SPA frontend for Building30 GTD system with Auth0, TanStack Query, SSE, and C3 design system

userStories.title: Scaffold Vite + React + Auth0 + TanStack Query + Tailwind
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the frontend project scaffolded with auth and data fetching.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize Vite project with React 19 + TypeScript template in the repo root (not in a subdirectory)
Install dependencies: @auth0/auth0-react, @tanstack/react-query, @microsoft/fetch-event-source, lucide-react
Install Tailwind CSS v4 and configure it
Configure Auth0Provider in main.tsx wrapping the app, reading from VITE_ env vars
Configure QueryClientProvider in main.tsx
Create .env.example with VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8080, VITE_AUTH0_DOMAIN, VITE_AUTH0_CLIENT_ID, VITE_AUTH0_AUDIENCE

Create .env.local with VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8080, VITE_AUTH0_DOMAIN=dev-gwbgo2ww358tjjby.eu.auth0.com, VITE_AUTH0_CLIENT_ID=RjNnnoVDET5U1IIUUnVbi5i9A4xK1Man, VITE_AUTH0_AUDIENCE=https://api.building30.io
Add .env.local to .gitignore
npm run dev starts without errors
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: This is a fresh repo. Run npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts to scaffold in place.

userStories.title: API client and shared types
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need a typed API client that injects Auth0 JWTs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/api-client.ts with fetch wrapper that calls getAccessTokenSilently() for every request
Handles GET, POST, PUT, DELETE with proper content-type headers
Parses error envelope {error: {code, message, status}} and throws typed errors
Create src/lib/types.ts with Card, CardDetail, ProjectContext, ServerEvent, TagStat, ApiError, PaginatedResponse types
API client reads base URL from VITE_API_URL env var
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Card type should match the server response shape from GET /api/cards

userStories.title: React Query hooks and SSE event stream
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need data fetching hooks for card operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/hooks/use-cards.ts with useCards(params?) and useCard(id) query hooks
Create src/lib/hooks/use-mutations.ts with useCreateCard, useUpdateCard, useDeleteCard, useMarkDone, useUpdateBody, useUpdateField mutations
All mutations invalidate relevant queries on success
Create src/lib/hooks/use-event-stream.ts using @microsoft/fetch-event-source with Authorization header from Auth0
SSE hook invalidates card queries on card_upsert/card_delete events
Create src/lib/hooks/use-views.ts with useToday, useNext, useAreas, useTags hooks
npm run build succeeds

userStories.title: Layout shell with C3 design system
userStories.description: As a user, I need the app layout with navigation so I can switch between views.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/App.tsx with three-panel layout: sidebar + main content + optional detail panel
Create src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx with nav links: Inbox, Today, Next, Projects, Areas, Waiting, Someday, Reference
Use lucide-react icons for nav items
Active route highlighted in sidebar
Install react-router-dom and set up routes for each view
Apply C3 design: Geist fonts (from Google Fonts or npm), zero border radius globally, oklch monochrome palette, minimal high-density layout
Create src/styles/globals.css with Tailwind + design tokens
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Use oklch(0.98 0 0) for bg, oklch(0.13 0 0) for text, oklch(0.85 0 0) for borders

userStories.title: Card list and card item components
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see a list of cards with key info displayed.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/cards/CardList.tsx rendering a scrollable list of CardItems
Create src/components/cards/CardItem.tsx showing title, type badge, tags (as small labels), due date if set
Clicking a card navigates to or selects it (updates URL or state)
Empty state shown when no cards match
npm run build succeeds

userStories.title: Card detail view with inline editing
userStories.description: As a user, I need to view and edit card details.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/cards/CardDetail.tsx showing full card: title, type, tags, body (rendered markdown), metadata
Title is click-to-edit (calls PUT /api/cards/:id/field)
Body is click-to-edit with a textarea (calls PUT /api/cards/:id/body)
Tags shown as removable badges, with an add-tag input
Action buttons: Mark Done, Move, Delete with confirmation
npm run build succeeds

userStories.title: Core views — Inbox, Today, Next
userStories.description: As a user, I need the main GTD views populated with real data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/InboxView.tsx using useCards({type: 'inbox'})
Create src/pages/TodayView.tsx using useToday() hook
Create src/pages/NextView.tsx using useNext() hook
Each view renders CardList with appropriate data
Clicking a card shows CardDetail in a side panel or expanded view
SSE events cause lists to update in real-time (via query invalidation)
npm run build succeeds

userStories.title: Action Center — triage and draft review
userStories.description: As a user, I need the triage workflow to process inbox items.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/ActionCenter.tsx fetching GET /api/action-queue
Shows cards one at a time in a wizard-like flow
For each card: display title, body, allow assigning to human/llm, adding tags, setting project
Submit calls POST /api/triage
Archive button calls POST /api/archive
Section for reviewing LLM drafts (cards with assigned=llm, llm_status=draft_ready) with approve/reject/revise buttons
npm run build succeeds

userStories.title: Projects and Areas views
userStories.description: As a user, I need project detail and area grouping views.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/ProjectsView.tsx listing all project cards
Clicking a project shows ProjectDetail with tasks grouped by status (kanban-style columns or list sections)
Project detail fetches GET /api/projects/:id/context
Create src/pages/AreasView.tsx using useAreas() hook, grouped by area tag
npm run build succeeds

userStories.title: Remaining views and polish
userStories.description: As a user, I need the secondary GTD views and overall polish.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/pages/WaitingView.tsx fetching cards with type=waiting
Create src/pages/SomedayView.tsx fetching cards with type=someday
Create src/pages/ReferenceView.tsx fetching cards with type=reference
Create new card button/form accessible from any view
Loading states shown while data is fetching
Error states shown when API calls fail
Auth0 login/logout button in sidebar or header
npm run build succeeds
